fix: SH assistant website flow — Telegram bridge + Supabase Realtime

- request/route.ts: skickar uppgifter via Telegram Bot API till clawdbot-sh
  (WebSocket fungerar ej från Vercel serverless)
- request/route.ts: sparar tasks i Supabase istf in-memory Map
- status/route.ts: läser från Supabase istf mock/in-memory
- callback/route.ts: uppdaterar clawdbot_tasks → triggar Realtime
- ChatWidget.tsx: Supabase Realtime subscription — öppnar och notifierar
  automatiskt när hemsida är klar. Tar bort VPS-statuskoll (alltid Online)
- 016_clawdbot_tasks.sql: ny tabell för persistent task-tracking + Realtime

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add session-manager support for authentication and mailbox access (#29) (#30)

When [session-manager] is configured in the shared TOML config, pop3d
delegates authentication (Login/Logout) and mailbox operations
(List/Fetch/Delete/Expunge) to the session-manager gRPC service instead
of using the domain auth router and local mail-session subprocesses.

Architecture:
- smclient.go: raw gRPC client using mail-session proto types (no
  msgstore imports, enforced via depguard)
- smstore.go: thin adapter wrapping SessionManagerClient as
  msgstore.MessageStore + io.Closer (calls Logout on close)
- auth_commands.go: dual dispatch path (session-manager vs legacy)
- session.go: Cleanup() closes store if io.Closer
- stack.go: wires up SessionManagerClient when configured
- .golangci.yml: depguard rules enforcing import boundary

https://github.com/infodancer/pop3d/issues/29

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Heat System + Recovery Window (ROADMAP Phase 3)

Heat meter (0-1) tracks run intensity from kills, dense combat, phase
transitions, and survival pressure. Decays during calm periods. Drives
visual spectacle: arena border warms blue→orange, bloom intensifies,
starfield gains diagonal drift, grid gets turbulence impulses, music
density increases.

Recovery window activates on respawn: 3.5s of invulnerability + 1.8x
fire rate with pulsing cyan shield ring, HUD banner, and procedural
audio cues (ascending power chord on start, descending warning on
expiry).

commit.message:
feat: GoPro GPS/IMU 数据叠加播放器

纯 Python 实现的 GoPro 视频播放器，自动从 MP4 中解析 GPMF 元数据，
在画面上实时叠加 GPS 定位和 IMU 加速度数据。

- gpmf_extract.py: MP4 容器解析 + GPMF KLV 二进制解码，支持 GPS9/GPS5/ACCL
- gopro_player.py: 视频播放 + OSD 叠加 + 进度条 + 变速播放 + 视频导出
- GPS5/GPS9 sample 级别去重，避免 HERO11+ 中重复数据导致时间戳回跳
- 变速播放通过增加跳帧数实现，保持 ~30fps 显示刷新率

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: resolve 5 remaining audit bugs before production deploy

- qr-payment: cancel order + clearCart on timeout back (B-1) — prevents
  zombie orders from dirty cart state after network timeout
- customer: use sessioned Supabase client in refreshTableRef and order
  UPDATE handler (B-2) — consistency with RLS session isolation
- orderStore: simplify completeOrder idempotency guard, remove flawed
  orders.length > 0 condition (B-3) — prevents false-pass on empty list
- QRPaymentModal: QR expiry no longer auto-cancels order (B-4) — user
  must explicitly press Cancel; adds optional onRetry prop + 2-button
  expired state UI
- orders: render fetchError banner with retry button (B-5)

commit.message:
Revert discovery/buy system to baseline — keep copy trade, free RPC, concurrency limiter, clean retry state

Reverted:
- Jupiter resolution (Attempt 0) removed — back to DexScreener → Birdeye chain
- DexScreener/Birdeye toggles removed (discovery always ON as before)
- Vol5m/Vol1h filter skip for webhook tokens removed
- WebSocket auto-reconnect watchdog removed
- 12h ticker window reverted to permanent dedup
- Forced DB discovery OFF removed
- HAB toggle UI for DS/Birdeye removed

Kept:
- Copy trade system (env wallets, executeCopyBuy, UI)
- Free RPC pool for WebSocket resolves
- Concurrency limiter (5 max parallel getParsedTransaction)
- Clean retry state (clearFlashRetryState, _flashRetryTimers, _flashInFlight)

commit.message:
Inline IfTruthy, Not, and IsNullOrFalse in Cranelift codegen

Replace runtime function calls with direct discriminant tag checks:
null(0)/false(1) are falsy, tag >= 2 is truthy. Eliminates function
call overhead for conditionals, any/all, alternative//, and not.

any/all now 83% faster vs pre-inline baseline (31x faster than jq).

feat: Liga IA+H Fase 3 — Ajuste Fino por Tipo de Documento

DOCUMENT TYPE TONE/NATURE guidelines adicionados ao system prompt:

LETTER (Carta/Brief):
  - Pessoal, afetivo, "Querido/a", "Com carinho"

MEMO:
  - Interno, direto, TO → SUBJECT → MESSAGE → ACTION

REPORT:
  - Analítico, estruturado, executive summary first

CONTRACT:
  - Jurídico, preciso, cláusulas numeradas

OFÍCIO:
  - Institucional, burocrático, "Vimos por meio desta"

BESCHEID:
  - Administrativo alemão, Rechtsgrundlage, formal

LICENSE:
  - Legal, EU-compliant, scope + conditions

EMAIL:
  - Conciso, parágrafos curtos, subject claro

PROTOCOL (Ata):
  - Factual, cronológico, DATA → PARTICIPANTES → DECISÕES

DECLARATION:
  - Formal, curto, "Declaro, sob as penas da lei"

Testado: Carta, Memo, Bescheid, Protocolo, Declaração, Email ✅

commit.message:
Add writer subscription plans — paid entries, Stripe recurring billing, 8% commission

Writers who are Plus subscribers with Stripe Connect can create a monthly
subscription plan ($1–$100/mo). Readers subscribe via Stripe Checkout.
Writers publish :paid entries visible only to subscribers. Inkwell takes 8%.

Backend: 2 migrations (paid privacy enum + writer_plans/plan_subscriptions
tables), WriterSubscriptions context module with Stripe product/price/checkout
integration, WriterSubscriptionController (11 routes), webhook routing for
subscription lifecycle, entry visibility enforcement across feed/explore/entry
controllers, account deletion cleanup, Slack notifications.

Frontend: PaywallCard overlay on entry detail, WriterSubscribeCard profile
sidebar widget, /settings/subscriptions management page, /for-writers marketing
landing page, editor paid privacy option, lock icon on feed cards, notification
type, 10 proxy routes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(backend): scaffold enterprise-grade backend architecture

- Hono + Node.js API server with versioned routes (/api/v1)
- Supabase (PostgreSQL) integration with typed repository pattern
- M/M/1 queue theory + Monte Carlo simulation engine (FR-04, FR-05)
- LCG pseudorandom number generator for reproducible simulations (FR-06)
- Discrete-event simulation (DES) engine in TypeScript
- Blockchain service via Ethers.js + Ganache local testnet (FR-03)
- LogiGuard.sol smart contract for immutable package logging
- JWT authentication middleware with role-based access control
- Zod validation at all request boundaries
- Structured logging via Pino
- In-memory rate limiter
- Global error handler with consistent ApiError shape
- Supabase DB migration with RLS, indexes, and stored functions
- .env.example with all required environment variables

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
